description:
This plugin takes in a text selection and formats the given input as a nice-looking TOC.

Features/limitations:
  - Asks user for the initial indentation level
  - When word wrapping occurs, the subsequent lines are indented by 2 characters more than initial indentation level
  - Width of text (80) and subsequent indent length (2) are hard coded

Example:

`Some text [[202512180127]]`
will produce
`Some text ................................................... [[202512180127]]`
title: TOC
